production_settings.source: opendde CLI `opendde pred` defaults (-c 10 -p 200 -e 5), aurekaresearch/OpenDDE main a0d5134, runner/batch_inference.py

parity_probe.rationale: sample=1 isolates the convergence variable (cycles/steps) from best-of-N selection; matches the reduced-settings run's sample=1 so the reduced->production comparison is controlled. 5x cheaper on CPU than the paper default.

cpu_reference_cost_estimate.method: two timed CPU probes on this host, same input, no-MSA, model forward time reported by the reference CLI
cpu_reference_cost_estimate.per_step_derivation: (331.27 - 31.59) / (20 - 2) = 16.65 s/step; the trunk cycle + structural-token expander/refiner + confidence head overhead is small relative to diffusion (regression intercept ~0), so diffusion steps dominate total forward time
cpu_reference_cost_estimate.note: torch CPU build has no fused triangle-ops fallback (same AF3-family ceiling already documented for Protenix-v2); multi-hour per 3-seed run, not feasible inside one worker turn -> backgrounded

device_self_floor_production.metric: kabsch_rmsd over CAs, device-vs-device across 3 seeds (C(3,2)=3 pairs)
device_self_floor_production.comparison_to_reduced: reduced-settings device floor D = 2.68 A (4c/20s/sample=1, 3 seeds, from opendde.json); production D = 8.06 A. The device folds DIVERGE more across seeds at production, not less.

reference_production_run.status: launched in background (nohup, cwd=/tmp outside worktree); survives this session
reference_production_run.pending: R (reference self-floor) and X (device-vs-reference) at production; compute by repackaging ref_prod output via scripts/opendde_ref_to_harness.py and re-running scripts/pharma_parity.py structures against dev_seed{0,1,2}
reference_production_run.do_not_kill: holds hours of sunk CPU progress

gap_status: STILL OPEN. Reduced-settings X=7.65 A / floor=2.68 A (2.85x) remains the best COMPLETE R/D/X data point. New partial evidence: the device self-floor grows from 2.68 A (reduced) to 8.06 A (production), so the device side does not converge at production and the gap may not close -- but conclusive resolution requires the reference production R and X, which are pending the background run. No fabricated numbers.
